_comment: Odoo 15 differentiation from odoo-12 base: Python 3.8 baseline, OWL 1.x introduced ALONGSIDE legacy QWeb+jQuery (transitional release), QWeb component split started. Legacy ORM still dominant — reuses odoo-12 rule pack but flag OWL-specific code via skill references. TODO: add templates/cursor/rules/odoo-15/ for OWL 1.x specifics.
description: Odoo 15 Community / Enterprise — Python 3.8+, TRANSITIONAL: QWeb+jQuery legacy + OWL 1.x intro. Legacy ORM dominant; reuses odoo-12 rule pack — flag OWL component code separately.

stack._doc: Per-stack optional path overrides — used by realdata_test MCP. Leave empty to let user set <PREFIX>_ODOO_BIN / <PREFIX>_ODOO_CONF env vars at runtime.

_rules_comment: TODO: differentiate from odoo-12 base when templates/cursor/rules/odoo-15/ is authored. v15 is transitional — most backend ORM still v12-era, only OWL frontend new.
